title: Fertiliser for Blockheads
description: An addon for Farming for Blockheads that adds the missing fertilised farmland blocks and gives them crafting recipes, as well as improving Botany Pots compat. I hope...
body:
An addon for Farming for Blockheads that adds the missing fertilised farmland blocks and gives them crafting recipes, as well as improving Botany Pots compat. I hope...

This is the first mod/addon I've ever made for MC, so feedback is welcome.
